name: Individual Pot Roasts
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans Sliced Mushrooms, Drained (Reserve Liquid), 4 ounces
2 Large Baking Potatoes, Peeled and Sliced into 1/4 Inch Thick Pieces
2 Medium Carrots, Pared and Halved Lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the beef shanks well to remove any debris.
2. In a bowl, combine the onion soup mix with the reserved mushroom liquid from the cans. Stir in the sliced mushrooms until well mixed.
3. Place a small amount of the mushroom mixture on top of each beef shank.
4. Arrange the sliced potatoes and carrots at the bottom of the crock-pot.
5. Position the beef shanks on top of the vegetables.
6. Pour any remaining mushroom mixture over the beef shanks.
7. Cover the crock-pot and cook on low setting for 10-12 hours.
8. Serve with unthickened gravy poured over the top.
